channel.title: Family Guy Guys
channel.itunes:author: Collin, Tyler, and Jason
channel.itunes:summary: A chronological rewatch podcast of Family Guy. Collin, Tyler, and Jason review every single episode.
channel.description: A chronological rewatch podcast of Family Guy. Collin, Tyler, and Jason review every single episode.

item.title: Chitty Chitty Death Bang
item.description: Lois plans a party for Stewie's first birthday, while Meg gets mixed up in a weird cult. Meanwhile, on the pod: Collin's faith in the project is severely shaken, Tyler aligns spiritually with the show after a trip to the Cheesecake Factory, and Jason declares the episode a clunker while sick all week. Plus, Star Wars references and sinus rinsing.

item.title: I Never Met the Dead Man
item.description: Peter teaches Meg to drive and immediately turns the town's satellite dish into scrap metal. That's the real episode. What we actually talk about: an AI that tried to summarize the season for us and just started inventing cults out of thin air, Jedi semen retention, Al Pacino (briefly), and so many stories about convertibles it'll make your head spin.

item.title: Death Has a Shadow
item.description: The format is introduced and immediately derailed. Stewie Gay Watch officially launches (verdict: not yet). Tyler reveals he watched the original broadcast as an 8-year-old. Collin did not see it until middle school and we judge him for it. Jason plays the theme song entirely too loud. The hogs are cranked. 461 episodes remaining.
